ROLLER AI Visibility Dashboard

AI Engine Optimization (AEO) Performance
Updated April 15, 2026
BRAND NAME OVERLAP NOTE
Data filtered using a curated exclusion list of 81K+ prompt terms. Mentions & SOV use kept prompts only (434 keywords). Citations use the full dataset (97K+ prompts).
Market Scope: Mentions, Impressions, and Citations are refined using 434 curated keywords (after 81K+ term exclusion) added to Ahrefs Brand Radar. All terms are contextually relevant to ROLLER's industry — covering venue management, ticketing, attractions, POS, booking, and related verticals. Terms are sourced from paid search, organic keywords, GSC queries, and the ROLLER website.
Refresh Schedule: Dashboard data is refreshed once a month, by the end of the first week of every month.
Prompt Data Note: Ahrefs Brand Radar does not capture actual user prompts. The "keywords" shown in the Prompts tab are search terms and phrases that Ahrefs tests against each AI platform to check for brand mentions — similar to how traditional keyword tracking works in SEO. They represent search intent, not verbatim user conversations.
Mentions by Competitor
No. of AI responses that name each brand
Impressions by Competitor
Est. monthly people seeing AI responses that name each brand
Citations by Competitor
How often each competitor's domain is cited as a source in AI responses
Trend Tracking
Trend data coming in future months
Monthly Snapshot Started April 2026
Trend charts will begin tracking month-over-month changes starting with this April 2026 snapshot. With the new post-exclusion methodology (434 curated keywords), historical trend data from Ahrefs is not directly comparable. Monthly snapshots will be collected at the end of each month going forward to establish reliable trend data under this filtering approach.
